name: Promissory Note (Unsecured)
description: A legally binding, unconditional promise in writing made by one person to pay a specific sum of money to another on a definite date.
content:
PROMISSORY NOTE

Due Date: {{formatDate due_date}}

Place of Payment: {{place_of_payment}}

Date of Issue: {{formatDate issue_date}}

FOR VALUE RECEIVED, I, {{maker_name}} (the "Maker"), hereby unconditionally promise to pay to the order of {{payee_name}} (the "Payee"), the principal sum of {{principal_amount}} ({{amount_in_words}}), on the Due Date written above.

{{#if interest_rate}}

If the principal sum is not paid by the Due Date, interest shall accrue on the unpaid balance at an annual rate of {{interest_rate}}% until paid in full.

{{/if}} {{#if (eq has_guarantor 'Yes')}}

Guarantor: {{guarantor_name}} (ID: {{guarantor_id}})

The undersigned Guarantor jointly and severally guarantees the prompt and full payment of this Note.


Guarantor Signature: _________________________


{{/if}}

MAKER (Borrower):

Name: {{maker_name}}

Address: {{maker_address}}

ID / SSN: {{maker_id}}


Maker Signature: _________________________

fields.name: place_of_payment
fields.label: Place of Payment
fields.placeholder: e.g., Payee's address or specified bank
